name: Palisades
description_short: Cannot generate profile: Website URL redirects to Clover Stadium (baseball park), not a consumer finance company. No financial services data available.
description_long: CRITICAL DATA MISMATCH: The provided website URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Palisades_Credit_Union_Park) redirects to a Wikipedia article about Clover Stadium, a 6,362-seat baseball park in Pomona, New York, operated by the New York Boulders. The stadium was formerly named 'Palisades Credit Union Park' from 2016–2021, indicating only a naming rights sponsorship by Palisades Federal Credit Union—not company ownership or operations. The article contains zero information about Palisades' financial products, services, lending terms, APRs, or consumer offerings. The website content exclusively documents stadium capacity, construction history, tenant teams, and notable events. Without access to Palisades' actual corporate website or financial services documentation, no factual company profile can be constructed. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' cannot be verified. A valid profile requires redirect to Palisades Federal Credit Union's official website and documentation of their actual loan products and terms.
